name: Suspicious Subprocess from RazerInstaller
notes:
This rule detects suspicious subprocess from RazerInstaller.exe.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth, Maxime Thiebaut
SIGMA Title: Suspicious RazerInstaller Explorer Subprocess
SIGMA Description: Detects a explorer.exe sub process of the RazerInstaller software which can be invoked from the installer to select a different installation folder but can also be exploited to escalate privileges to LOCAL SYSTEM


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'razerinstaller.exe' AND LOWER("Integrity Level") == 'system' ) AND LOWER("Process File File Path") NOT LIKE 'c:\\windows\\installer\\razer\\installer\\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Subprocess from RazerInstaller on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'razerinstaller.exe' 	AND LOWER("Integrity Level") == 'system' ) AND LOWER("Process File File Path") NOT LIKE 'c:\\windows\\installer\\razer\\installer\\%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Subprocess from RazerInstaller
Event description: Detects suspicious subprocess from RazerInstaller.exe.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
